SS2_NEMHUNTRESS2_DESCRIPTION: The Nemesis Huntress engages contra enemies slowly sed ruthlessly cum eorum deadly longbow et double headed hatchet.\n\n<color=#CCD3E0>< ! > Death doesn't fear itself.
SS2_NEMHUNTRESS2_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abierunt, finding a new home far away.
SS2_NEMESIS_HUNTRESS_PASSIVE_DESC: Highlight <style=cIsDamage>Weak Points</style> while in combat, quae potest struck cum all arrows pro <style=cIsDamage>1.5x vulnere</style>.
SS2_NEMESIS_HUNTRESS_PRIMARY_BOW_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Agile</style>. Tene ad <style=cIsUtility>charge</style>, et dimitte ad fire an arrow pro up to <style=cIsDamage>400% vulnere</style>. Arrow <style=cIsUtility>velocity</style>, <style=cIsDamage>damage</style>, et <style=cIsUtility>accuracy</style> scale cum charge level.
SS2_NEMESIS_HUNTRESS_SECONDARY_DESC: Swing et throw a boomeranging, piercing hatchet pro <style=cIsDamage>240% vulnere</style>. Hits <style=cIsDamage>5 times per second</style> while in the air.
SS2_KEYWORD_REARM: <style=cKeywordName>Rearming</style><style=cSub>Adds 2 more projectiles to the next use of primary, usque ad maximum of 7.
SS2_NEMESIS_HUNTRESS_UTILITY_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Agile</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Rearming</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Disappear</style> et <style=cIsUtility>teleport</style> a short distance. Potest condere usque ad <style=cIsUtility>3</style> charges.
SS2_NEMESIS_HUNTRESS_EXPLOSIVE_BOW_DESC: Swap the arrow of your next <style=cIsDamage>primary</style> cum a <style=cIsDamage>stunning</style> arrow quod explodes shortly post impact pro <style=cIsDamage>400% vulnere</style>.
